name: Cross Swivel
preceding_figure_names: Double Reverse Spin,Heel Pivot (Quarter Turn To Left),Reverse Pivot
following_figure_names: Tipple Chasse To Right,Running Finish,Fish Tail,Tipsy To R (After LF back with Lady OP, TH, S, into Tipsy to R)
notes: Alternative styling: RF to side, knees inward; LF to side, knee inward; give arms to R; keep left side lifted; give R side to Man; stay connected; turn head to R; rise feeling before next S lower to normal; not sinking down.

steps.action: RF closes to LF slightly back without weight
LF closes to RF slightly forward without weight
comments: Use hip joint to start the turn, standing knee (R knee) stays forward over the standing foot (RF), do not move the knee off the standing foot. Use ab muscle to pull to the back of foot, do not leave middle forward and shoulder weight back. Heel of RF does not lower until the turn is completed. Head is still left. At end of &: there is "up" rise feeling before the next S lower to normal.
Body forms a line, slanted straight to R, keep left side lifted. Give R side to Man. Stay connected. Turn head to R. At end of &: rise in body before next S to lower to normal. (not "sinking down").
